student_input: My FSc marks are 550/1100 and NET is 98/200. I want to apply to NUST.

state.student_input: My FSc marks are 550/1100 and NET is 98/200. I want to apply to NUST.
state.advice: Although your merit score of 49.25% is close, unfortunately, you are not eligible for admission to NUST at this time. Focus on improving your FSC marks, as they contribute 25% to your merit score. Since your FSC score is 550 out of 1100, which is 50%, and your NET score is 98 out of 200, which is 49%, consider retaking the NET to increase your overall merit score, as it contributes 75% to your merit score. With a higher NET score, you may be able to increase your merit score above the required threshold for eligibility.

output.reason: The advice is realistic, honest, and consistent with the score and eligibility given. It clearly explains the reasons for ineligibility, provides a breakdown of the merit score components, and offers actionable suggestions for improvement, such as retaking the NET to increase the overall merit score.
